connections.gloss: army, band, battle, camp, company, drove, host, tents.
abide (in tents), camp, dwell, encamp, grow to an end, lie, pitch (tent), rest in tent.

connections.def: from a compound of 3844 and 1685; a throwing in beside (juxtaposition), i.e. (specially), battle-array, encampment or barracks (tower Antonia):--army, camp, castle. see GREEK for 3844 see GREEK for…
